top.name: Arcane Supremacy
top.rules_text: Permanently enchant 3 tiles of your choice: they become Arcane Pillars that grant +2 to all stats for allies standing on them reduce enemy damage by 2 and auto-trigger Hex on enemies that end turn adjacent. Cannot be destroyed.

bottom.name: Puppeteer
bottom.rules_text: For 2 turns: at the start of each enemy turn you choose where each enemy moves (up to 2 tiles). Enemies that move onto your prepared tiles trigger them.
